---
title: "SKIDLE"
subtitle: "Long-read Flye assembly + BinArena visualization pipeline for metagenomics."
date: "2024-09-01"
categories: [metagenomics, long-read, assembly]
image: skidle.png
image-alt: "BinArena visualization of a metagenomic assembly"
---

A visualization pipeline that doubles as a long-read metagenomics tutorial — covering Flye assembly through BinArena exploration. The full walkthrough is packaged as a Google Colaboratory notebook.

[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1grezI6faG4OpHTAgmbwmiF-_DvSujhZP)
